variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAH 02A16SEM003 Oil Bath Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAH 02A16SEM003 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
